Strings.Help.Short.Help: Show This Blurb, Or In-Depth Help For A Command
Strings.Help.Short.Search: Show All Apps That Contain The Query In Their AppID
Strings.Help.Short.Create: Create A New App Manifest & Associated File Bundles.
Strings.Help.Long.Help: Show Short Help For All Commands, Or In-Depth Help For A Single Command.
Strings.Help.Long.Search: Search The MabelHUB App List For All Apps That Contain The Query String In Their AppIDs.
Strings.Help.Long.Info: Show Info About A Specific App, Like "Name", "Author" And "Version".
Strings.Help.Long.Laucnh: Launch The Main Executable For A Specific App.
Strings.Help.Long.Install:
Install A Specific App's Manifest And Unpack It's File Bundle For Your OS.
Note: You Will Get An Error If The App Doesn't Support Your OS, And A Warning If It Doesn't Support Your System's Language.
Strings.Help.Long.Update: Update A Specific App To It's Latest Available Version.
Strings.Help.Long.BatchUpdate: Updates All Your Installed Apps One After Another.
Strings.Help.Long.Create: Create A New App, With It's Associated App Manifest And Platform File Bundles, With A Version, Set Of Platform Main Executable File Names, Set Of Folder Paths And Set Of Supported Languages.
